name: algolia
description: Twelve specialist skills for Algolia-powered search: index design, relevance tuning, InstantSearch React/Next.js, Autocomplete, search-client, indexing pipelines (Contentful → Algolia, batch + streaming), API-key strategy, the Recommend API, AI search and Personalization (NeuralSearch), Insights events and A/B, Contentful ↔ Algolia integration, and Algolia MCP/CLI workflows.
